item.title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: SimpleX Chat [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: simplexchat
item.itunes:summary:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.description:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
SimpleX Chat
(Chat & Messenging)
SimpleX - the first messaging platform operating without user identifiers of any kind - 100% private by design!
Security assessment was done by Trail of Bits in November 2022.

SimpleX Chat features:

- end-to-end encrypted messages, with editing, replies and deletion of messages.
- sending end-to-end encrypted images and files.
- single-use and long-term user addresses.
- secret chat groups - only group members know it exists and who is the member.
- end-to-end encrypted audio and video calls.
- private instant notifications.
- portable chat profile - you can transfer your chat contacts and history to another device (terminal or mobile).
- encrypted app database and files in the app storage (except videos).
- 18 interface languages.

SimpleX Chat advantages:

* Full privacy of your identity, profile, contacts and metadata: unlike any other existing messaging platform, SimpleX uses no phone numbers or any other identifiers assigned to the users - not even random numbers. This protects the privacy of who you are communicating with, hiding it from SimpleX platform servers and from any observers.
* Complete protection against spam and abuse: as you have no identifier on SimpleX platform, you cannot be contacted unless you share a one-time invitation link or an optional temporary user address.
* Full ownership, control and security of your data: SimpleX stores all user data on client devices, the messages are only held temporarily on SimpleX relay servers until they are received.
* Decentralized network: you can use SimpleX with your own servers and still communicate with people using the servers that are pre-configured in the apps or any other SimpleX servers.

You can connect to anybody you know via link or scan QR code (in the video call or in person) and start sending messages instantly - no emails, phone numbers or passwords needed.
Your profile and contacts are only stored in the app on your device - our servers do not have access to this information.
All messages are end-to-end encrypted using open-source double-ratchet protocol; the messages are routed via our servers using open-source SimpleX Messaging Protocol.

Please send us any questions via the app or submit an issue on GitHub.

Follow us on Mastodon, Twitter and Reddit for the latest updates.

Once you install SimpleX Chat, "connect to developers" for any questions, to share feedback, and to discover the groups (the link for directory service will be in response).
[read more]

item.title: NTFS File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: NTFS File Recovery Application [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: memorycardrecovery
item.itunes:summary:
NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]
item.description:
NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]

NTFS File Recovery Application
(Utilities)
NTFS file recovery application is useful to retrieve corrupted photographs, wallpapers, screensaver, text file, images, audio, video, official document or other important files from all major types of hard drive including SATA, SCSI, ATA, IDE, EIDE. Data restoration software is capable to regain erased text file which run on various Windows tool like excel sheet, office word file, pdf file, ppt or other documents file in simple and easiest way from hard drive partitioned on NTFS and NTFS5 file system.

[read more]

item.title: Inventory Barcodes Designing Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Inventory Barcodes Designing Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: barcodesystem
item.itunes:summary:
Inventory Barcodes Designing Tool
(Office Apps)
Advance version of Inventory Barcodes Software is able to set bar height and density for designed stickers by the help of margin details like value, header and footer as per user requirements. Label printing application generates badges using 2D or linear font style and also allows user to save at specified location in desired format.

[read more]

Label printing application generates badges using 2D or linear font style and also allows user to save at specified location in desired format.

Label printing application generates badges using 2D or linear font style and also allows user to save at specified location in desired format.

item.title: Professional Data Restoration Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Professional Data Restoration Utility [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Professional Data Restoration Utility
(Utilities)
User defined and professional data restoration utility is easily downloaded from website URL www.driverecoverysoftware.org to restore important official documents of various types like xls, xlxs, doc, docx, ppt etc from storage media devices without required any technical expert guidance or training. DriveRecovery Software is capable to revive lost pictures in minimal time that lost by software/hardware malfunction from hard disk drive.
[read more]

DriveRecovery Software is capable to revive lost pictures in minimal time that lost by software/hardware malfunction from hard disk drive.

DriveRecovery Software is capable to revive lost pictures in minimal time that lost by software/hardware malfunction from hard disk drive.

item.title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:title: eric [IDEs]
item.itunes:author: detlev
item.itunes:summary:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.description:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
eric
(IDEs)
Eric is a Python IDE written using PyQt6 and QScintilla2. It has integrated project management capabilities, it gives you an unlimited number of editors, an integrated Python shell, an integrated debugger, integrated interfaces to Mercurial, Git and Subversion, integrated unittest and much more. It is extensible via an integrated plug-in system.
Eric requires Python 3 as a runtime environment.

It is available through the eric website at "http://eric-ide.python-projects.org".
[read more]

item.title: Memory Card Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Memory Card Restoration Software [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: recoverysoftware
item.itunes:summary:
Memory Card Restoration Software
(Utilities)
Have you lost all your unforgettable pictures from SD card due to unintentionally format? No need to panic just take a look at www.driverecoverysoftware.org refers to Software for Card Recovery that support recovery of missing information from memory card of all major brands including Nikon, Toshiba etc. folder restoration program retrieves multimedia files from virus corrupted, formatted memory card storage devices.
[read more]

item.title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:title: RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER [System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS)]
item.itunes:author: revwhiteshadow
item.itunes:summary:
RED MAGIC GAME LAUNCHER
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))
"Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK: Unleash the Power of Gaming on Android! Experience the ultimate gaming performance on your Android device with the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK. This powerful and intuitive launcher optimizes your gaming experience, offering enhanced graphics, smooth gameplay, and customizable settings. Elevate your gaming sessions with advanced features such as game boosting, performance optimization, and seamless compatibility with a wide range of popular titles. Download the Red Magic Game Launcher Ported APK from revWhiteShadow on a gaming adventure like never before!"

[read more]

item.title: Softaken Upgrade PST tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Softaken Upgrade PST tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: softaken-tools
item.itunes:summary:
Softaken Upgrade PST tool
(Utilities)
Download the Softaken Upgrade PST tool to upgrade PST ANSI to UNICODE effortlessly. You can effortlessly upgrade your PST ANSI to a New UNICODE PST file. This tool has a user-friendly interface, with the help of this tool you can upgrade PST file size from 2GB to unlimited. You can export old ANSI Outlook editions to New Unicode. A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Moreover, it will scan your entire upgraded file.
[read more]

A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Download the Softaken Upgrade PST tool to upgrade PST ANSI to UNICODE effortlessly. You can effortlessly upgrade your PST ANSI to a New UNICODE PST file. This tool has a user-friendly interface, with the help of this tool you can upgrade PST file size from 2GB to unlimited. You can export old ANSI Outlook editions to New Unicode. A user with non–technical skills can smoothly utilize its functions. you can easily work with this tool at home as well as in the office freely. You can upgrade your Outlook PST. This software maintains your originality of upgraded PST files. This software has multiple features which we have discussed below. With the help of this tool, you can export ANSI to UNICODE PST. This tool supports all Outlook editions. You don’t require any Outlook installation to work with this tool. Upgrade Outlook PST for limitless storage. Thus it saves you time during the upgrade. Moreover, it will scan your entire upgraded file.

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Join Official Channel[/url]

[url=https://t.me/godTspeed]Official Group to Share Your Problem[/url]

[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]
[h3][b] FIND MORE PROJECT FROM ☞ [/h3] [/b] [url=https://www.pling.com/u/revwhiteshadow] @revWhiteShadow [/url]
[color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color][color=#FF0000]____[/color][color=#800080]____[/color][color=#0000FF]____[/color][color=#008000]____[/color]




"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
[read more]
item.description:
GODSPEED NRFO
(System Tools (NOT OS or ROMS))

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

item.content:encoded:

"NO ROOT FULL OPTIMIZATION" (NRFO), a cutting-edge optimizer developed by revWhiteShadow specifically designed to enhance the gaming experience on non-rooted Android devices.

NRFO is a revolutionary solution that eliminates the need for rooting your device while still delivering exceptional performance improvements. With NRFO, gamers can unlock the full potential of their Android devices, allowing them to play demanding games smoothly, without any lag or slowdowns.

By implementing advanced optimization techniques, NRFO intelligently manages system resources, fine-tuning various parameters to ensure optimal performance during gameplay. It optimizes CPU usage, prioritizes gaming processes, and minimizes background tasks, resulting in reduced system load and increased frame rates.

NRFO also provides additional features tailored for gaming enthusiasts. It offers a dedicated Game Mode that maximizes device performance by disabling unnecessary services and notifications, providing an immersive gaming environment. Moreover, NRFO includes a Game Turbo feature that further boosts gaming performance by optimizing graphics settings and reducing input lag.

With NRFO, non-rooted Android users can enjoy a seamless and immersive gaming experience on their devices, previously thought to be limited to rooted devices. It empowers gamers to play their favorite games at their full potential, ensuring smooth gameplay, faster loading times, and an overall enhanced gaming experience.

Revolutionize your non-rooted Android gaming experience with NRFO and unlock the true gaming potential of your device. Get ready to embark on gaming adventures like never before!
